message:
🐛 Fix installer/solution loading reset on navigation (#1540)

Move mission fetch to module-level cache that persists across dialog
open/close cycles. Previously, navigating away cancelled in-flight
fetches and cleared all loaded data, forcing a full restart.

- Add module-level missionCache with listener pattern for React sync
- Fetch runs once globally; subsequent dialog opens use cached data
- Cache notifies all mounted components of incremental updates
- Loading states derived from cache status, not local React state
- Remove init-effect lines that cleared installer/solution arrays

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
